name: Barbell Shrug
resistance_profile: Scapular elevation for the upper traps; full shrug range, no rolling.
cues: Shrug straight up to the ears
execution_steps: Deadlift or unrack the bar to standing, hands just outside your hips, arms straight.
Stand tall with shoulders relaxed down and core braced.
Shrug the shoulders straight up toward your ears.
Pause briefly at the top, then lower under control to a full stretch without rolling the shoulders.
good_when: You want to directly build the upper traps with heavy absolute load.
You can already handle a loaded bar and want a simple movement to progressively overload.
bad_when: You want a longer range and bigger stretch on the traps (dumbbells allow more range).
Grip strength fails before the traps are challenged (use straps or a machine).
